descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeated Humboldt Broncos 5-3 in Centennial Cup Western Canada final playoff game.
descriptionLong: Matt Hervey scored two goals as the Richmond Sockeyes defeated the Humboldt Broncos 5-3 on Sunday in Centennial Cup playoff action, giving Richmond a 3-1 series lead. Goals from Brian Kozak, Dave Tomlinson, and Dave Rutherford supplemented Hervey's effort. Frank Romeo recorded 30 saves for the Sockeyes while Humboldt's Bruce Hoffort made 22 stops. Game six was scheduled for Tuesday night in Richmond.

attribution.headline: Sockeyes Edge Broncos in Centennial Cup Playoff
